name: Peri Fairywinkle
description:
Hazel Wells: 10-year-old African American girl with curly dark brown hair, brown eyes, and a distinctive gap in her front teeth, typically seen in a blue sweater with pink stripes, blue pants, and green sneakers, embodying a spunky, caring, and intelligent personality.

Dev Dimmadome: Dev is a light skinned young boy with blue eyes and red-orange hair which is short and styled into a crew cut who is almost always shown wearing sunglasses. He wears a white hoodie with a gold zipper, black jeans, and white boots with small gold plating.

Peri Fairywinkle: Peri has periwinkle hair matching his new name, and a hairstyle that combines those of his parents', being a shaggier version of Wanda’s signature hair swirl. He now wears suspenders and has a new wand that doubles as a cane. His button up is lilac and his pants are a dark purple.

Cosmo: green-haired, green-eyed, dim-witted fairy godparent who wears a white shirt, black tie, black pants, and black shoes, complete with a magic wand, often appearing goofy and hyper but ultimately loving, and he's Timmy Turner's primary fairy godparent alongside Wanda.

Wanda: wavy pink hair in a spiral, pink eyes, magic wand, usually wearing a yellow shirt, black pants, and black boots, often seen as the smarter, more cautious half of the fairy duo with Cosmo.
creator: brooke_long
